data.whoToFind: Recruiter or team member for Controllers, Funding Product Controllers, Analyst
data.message: Hi Erika, I saw the Controllers, Funding Product Controllers, Analyst opening at Goldman Sachs and wanted to connect. I'm a financial data analyst with reconciliation and reporting experience across 650 plus accounts at Bloomberg and TD Bank. Would love 15 minutes if you're open to it.
data.messageLong: Hi Erika, I saw the Controllers, Funding Product Controllers, Analyst opening at Goldman Sachs and wanted to connect. I'm a financial data analyst currently at TD Bank, where I resolve 20 to 25 documented cases weekly, and previously supported 400 plus portfolio managers at Bloomberg reconciling data across 650 plus managed accounts. Goldman's Controllers group is exactly the kind of rigorous, high accountability environment I want to grow in. If you have 15 minutes, I would love to hear more about the team. Thanks either way.
data.cadence: send Tue to Thu morning. If no reply, one polite bump after 5 to 7 days, then stop. Never attach the resume in the first message.

data.message: Hi Kiara, I just applied for the Global Client Engagement Analyst role. At Bloomberg I kept client reporting data accurate for 400+ institutional PMs under weekly deadlines. Would you be open to a short chat about the team? Thanks, Neil
data.messageLong: Hi Kiara, I applied yesterday for the Global Client Engagement Analyst opening. My background is client facing data work at Bloomberg, supporting 400+ institutional PMs and the weekly performance and holdings files behind their reporting, plus regulated casework at TD Bank. Blue Owl's growth in alternatives is the draw. Would you have 15 minutes to share what the team needs most right now? Thanks either way.
